---
title: "George Alan [or Allan?] David Yonge"
---

## George Alan [or Allan?] David Yonge

**Dates:** (1871-21/2 Oct 1899)

### Description

nephew of CMY

### Biography

Son  of JBY.  He was killed at Rhodes Drift, Crocodile River, in what is now Zimbabwe, during the Boer War.  Recorded as a medical student aged 19 in 1881 census, probably in mistake for his brother Arthur, he emigrated to Rhodesia and also served in the Matabele War of 1896. [wills index, left £4881)

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 12th  [1899]
- Letter from Novr 24th [1899]
- Letter from November 4, 1899.
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 12 [1899]](../letters/3416_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, April 14th [?1899]](../letters/3404_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Aug 5th 1897
- Letter from July 1st [1897]
- Letter from Feb 20th [1897]
- Letter from Easter day [5 April 1885]
- Letter from April 19th [mid 1880s?]
- Letter from May 8 th [1876]
- Letter from Sept 13th [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
